productDisplayName: Little Miss Intimates Black Pyjama Set
description: Style NoteWe love this cute pyjama set from little miss intimates which has a girly vibe and keeps you feeling young. Bright colours with cartoon prints, immensely comfortable and super soft fabric makes this just what you want to go to to sleep in or spend a day lounging at home. Product DetailsBlack spaghetti top, has a pink printed binding around the arm holes and straps, graphic print on the chest in pink and silver with contrast pink stitched detail at the neckline and hem, round neckline.
